heading: Wartime presumptions for certain veterans
label: 1137 Wartime presumptions for certain veterans
text: For the purposes of this subchapter and subchapter V of this chapter and notwithstanding the provisions of sections 1132 and 1133 of this subchapter, the provisions of sections 1111, 1112, and 1113 of this chapter shall be applicable in the case of any veteran who served in the active military, naval, air, or space service after .December 31, 1946
notes: Amendments2021— substituted “air, or space service” for “or air service”.Pub. L. 116–2831991—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(a)section 337 of this title, substituted “1132 and 1133” for “332 and 333” and “1111, 1112, and 1113” for “311, 312, and 313”.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(c)(1)1974— substituted “” for “”.Pub. L. 93–295December 31, 1946January 31, 1955
Effective Date of 1974 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 93–295section 401 of Pub. L. 93–295section 1114 of this titleMay 1, 1974
